name: germinal_pdl1_binder
description: Germinal-style PD-L1 VHH redesign matching examples/scripts/germinal_pdl1_sampling.py defaults. The program uses the PD-L1 target from examples/germinal/pdbs/pdl1.pdb chain A and the VHH scaffold from examples/germinal/pdbs/nb.pdb chain A, with a stitched AF2 Germinal template at examples/germinal/pdbs/pdl1_nb_template.pdb. Stages are logit-gradient design, softmax-gradient refinement, and pLDDT-weighted semigreedy MCMC. The JSON uses the script smoke-test defaults: 3 logit steps, 2 softmax steps, 3 MCMC steps, 2 results, seed 7, one AF2 recycle, CDR-only design positions, scaffold sequence bias, and the current first-class AF2/AbLang constraint keys.

segments.label: VHH scaffold from nb.pdb chain A
PD-L1 target from pdl1.pdb chain A
